fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for closing the opportunity.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the reason for closing the opportunity.

fields.name: No. of Opportunities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of opportunities closed using this close opportunity code. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the opportunity was a success or a failure.
